positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a friendly astronaut floating among bioluminescent galaxies and nebulae. The main astronaut figure is rendered with clean lines and a subtle retro-futuristic palette of deep blues, vibrant magenta, turquoise, and cosmic gold. The composition should be central, featuring the astronaut framed by swirling cosmic dust and stylized constellations. The overall style must be vector-graphic inspired, pop art meets sci-fi poster art, with high contrast silhouettes and smooth, scalable details suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on clean edges and dynamic yet balanced symmetry. Mid-century modern illustration style.
